title.ro: Constructor de plan de lecÈ›ie complet

content.en:
Create a complete 45-minute lesson plan for teaching [topic] to [grade level / age group] students with [brief class profile, e.g. 'mixed ability, 24 students, some ELL learners'].

Include:
- Learning objectives (3 max, using Bloom's action verbs)
- Materials and resources needed
- Warm-up / hook activity (5 min)
- Main instruction with teacher and student actions (25 min)
- Guided or collaborative practice (10 min)
- Closure / exit activity (5 min)
- Differentiation notes for struggling and advanced learners
- Homework suggestion (optional)

Format as a structured, easy-to-print lesson plan.

content.en:
Generate 3 creative warm-up activities (5â€“7 minutes each) for a lesson on [topic] for [grade level] students.

For each activity provide:
- A catchy name
- Clear step-by-step instructions
- What materials or tech are needed (if any)
- How it connects to the lesson's main topic
- A variation for online/hybrid classes

The activities should activate prior knowledge, spark curiosity, or build community â€” not introduce new content. At least one should be movement-based and one should be discussion-based.

- Cum se leagÄƒ de subiectul principal al lecÈ›iei
- O variantÄƒ pentru clasele online/hibrid

title.ro: Generator de obiective pe taxonomia Bloom

content.en:
Write a complete set of learning objectives for a unit on [topic] for [grade level], covering all six levels of Bloom's Revised Taxonomy.

For each level, write one clear, measurable objective using an appropriate action verb:
1. Remember â€“ recall, list, define
2. Understand â€“ explain, summarize, describe
3. Apply â€“ use, solve, demonstrate
4. Analyze â€“ compare, differentiate, examine
5. Evaluate â€“ justify, critique, assess
6. Create â€“ design, produce, develop

Then suggest one activity or assessment task that best addresses each objective. Keep the language student-facing ('Students will be able toâ€¦').
content.ro:

Pentru fiecare nivel, scrie un obiectiv clar È™i mÄƒsurabil, folosind un verb de acÈ›iune potrivit:
1. Reamintire â€“ a recunoaÈ™te, a enumera, a defini
2. ÃŽnÈ›elegere â€“ a explica, a rezuma, a descrie
3. Aplicare â€“ a utiliza, a rezolva, a demonstra
4. AnalizÄƒ â€“ a compara, a diferenÈ›ia, a examina
5. Evaluare â€“ a justifica, a critica, a aprecia
6. Creare â€“ a proiecta, a produce, a dezvolta

SugereazÇŽ apoi o activitate sau sarcinÄƒ de evaluare care sÄƒ corespundÄƒ fiecÄƒrui obiectiv. Limbajul sÄƒ fie orientat spre elev ('Elevii vor fi capabili sÄƒâ€¦').
